## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] `agenraci validate examples/sprout/charter.yaml` passes
- [ ] One rule / one feature in this PR (kept focused)
- [ ] If checker-rule behavior changed: updated `SPEC.md` and the rules table in `README.md`
- [ ] If a rule was added/changed: added a test (one known-good + one known-bad that trips only this rule)
